channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Oil prices plunge and stocks soar after U.S. and Iran agree on ceasefire
item.description: Investors around the world breathed a sigh of relief at the prospect of peace — and an easing of the global energy crisis.
item.content:encoded:
Investors around the world breathed a sigh of relief at the prospect of peace — and an easing of the global energy crisis.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Maria Aspan

item.title: U.S., Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire. And, Trump-backed Clay Fuller wins House race
item.description: The U.S. reached a last-minute ceasefire with Iran just before Trump's deadline for the country to meet his demands. And, Trump-backed Clay Fuller wins the U.S. House race in Georgia.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. reached a last-minute ceasefire with Iran just before Trump's deadline for the country to meet his demands. And, Trump-backed Clay Fuller wins the U.S. House race in Georgia.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Your sarcasm is showing — and its history is surprisingly violent
item.description: Some people use sarcasm jokingly. But funnily enough, we tend not to find it witty when we're on the receiving end.
item.content:encoded: Some people use sarcasm jokingly. But funnily enough, we tend not to find it witty when we're on the receiving end.
item.dc:creator: Ayana Archie

item.title: Colleges are trying to boost student voting. A Trump probe freezes data for that work
item.description: To figure out how to boost student voting, colleges have relied on a study about campus voter registration and turnout rates. A Trump administration investigation has cut schools off from new data.
item.content:encoded:
To figure out how to boost student voting, colleges have relied on a study about campus voter registration and turnout rates. A Trump administration investigation has cut schools off from new data.

(Image credit: Angela Weiss)
item.dc:creator: Hansi Lo Wang

item.title: Abortion clinics are closing nationwide. Could urgent care help fill the gap?
item.description: When the only clinic that offered abortions in Michigan's rural Upper Peninsula closed, an urgent care decided to step in to fill the gap. Now, others are considering similar moves as brick-and-mortar clinics close in blue states.
item.content:encoded:
When the only clinic that offered abortions in Michigan's rural Upper Peninsula closed, an urgent care decided to step in to fill the gap. Now, others are considering similar moves as brick-and-mortar clinics close in blue states.

(Image credit: Kate Wells)
item.dc:creator: Kate Wells

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: U.S. and Iran agree to two week ceasefire, how Iranians are responding to the ceasefire, the effects of the war in Iran give investors around the world whiplash.
item.content:encoded: U.S. and Iran agree to two week ceasefire, how Iranians are responding to the ceasefire, the effects of the war in Iran give investors around the world whiplash.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: The U.S. and Iran agree to a 2-week ceasefire
item.description: President Trump said the U.S. and Israel would suspend bombing Iran for two weeks if Iran follows through on its commitment to reopen the Strait of Hormuz for safe passage.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump said the U.S. and Israel would suspend bombing Iran for two weeks if Iran follows through on its commitment to reopen the Strait of Hormuz for safe passage.

(Image credit: AFP via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Telehealth abortion will remain available for now, after a federal judge's ruling
item.description: The abortion pill mifepristone must undergo a safety review by the FDA, the judge said. Louisiana's case seeking to ban its use through telemedicine will proceed after that review.
item.content:encoded:
The abortion pill mifepristone must undergo a safety review by the FDA, the judge said. Louisiana's case seeking to ban its use through telemedicine will proceed after that review.

(Image credit: Anna Moneymaker)
item.dc:creator: Selena Simmons-Duffin

item.title: Trump has backed down from his threat to wipe out Iran's civilization
item.description: President Trump has backed down from his threat to wipe out Iran's civilization and bomb its power plants by Tuesday night. Online, he said he agreed to suspend the bombing of Iran for two weeks.
item.content:encoded: President Trump has backed down from his threat to wipe out Iran's civilization and bomb its power plants by Tuesday night. Online, he said he agreed to suspend the bombing of Iran for two weeks.
item.dc:creator: Aya Batrawy

item.title: The Artemis II crew saw parts of the moon never seen before. Here's what they said
item.description: The astronauts on Artemis II observed parts of the moon humans had never seen before. Their findings provide a scientific baseline — and sense of wonder — for future missions.
item.content:encoded: The astronauts on Artemis II observed parts of the moon humans had never seen before. Their findings provide a scientific baseline — and sense of wonder — for future missions.
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger
